titleStmt.title: SII 17.731: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 731. (A.R. No. 674 of 1904.) TIRUMULLAIVĀYAL, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the central shrine in the Māśilāmaṇīśvara temple.

This inscription records the sale of 15 vēli of land with rights of irrigation, for 60 paḻampuḷḷi-māḍai, by the mahāsabhā of Agaram Kōḻippadāgai alias Kulōttuṅgasōḻachatūrvēdimaṅgalam, in Kāṉappēṟūr-nāḍu, in Puḻaṟ-kōṭṭam, as tirunāmattukkāṇi, to the deity.
In detailing the boundaries of the land, the record mentions the highway at Niṉṟavūr

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīrājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 6 vatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻama
ṇṭalattup puḻaṟkoṭṭattuk kāṉappeṟūr nāṭṭu Akaram koḻippatākaiyāṉa ku
lottuṅkacoḻaccaturvvedimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom Eṅkaḷur Āyamāṭai
kku tirumullaivāyiluṭaiya mahādevaṟku Eṅkaḷūr nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamā
vatu kiḻkaḻaṉi Aiyyaṉ Eriyum kaḻaṉikkum kiḻpā kellai tirumullaivāyil
Ellaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai niṉṟavūr peruvaḻikku vaṭakkum melpā
ṟkellai taṇṭaṅkaḻikkum Aiyyaṉeri melkaṭaikkum vaṭakkil puḷiyaṅku
ṭikkum kuṭṭiceṟuvukkum kiḻakku cerimeṭunattamum vaṭapāṟkellai viḷakkuppaṭṭikkum tirukkāṉerikaraikku teṟkum
yiṉṉāṉkellaiyuḷakappaṭṭa nilam patiṉaiy veliyum Ittevaṟku viṟṟu nāṅkaḷ kaikkoṇṭa paḻampuḷḷimā
ṭai 6 10 Immāṭai Aṟupatum kaikkoṇṭu yiṉṉilam tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka viṟṟu Iṉṉilattukku Eṅkaḷur peri
yeri nirum pāyakkaṭavatākac cilālekai paṇṇikkuṭuttom koḻippatākai mahāsabhai yom sabhaipaṇiyāl maddhyastan
ko ppatākaiyuṭaiyāṉ taḻuvakkuḻaintāṉ Eḻuttu:
Digital edition of SII 17.731 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
